extra.reason: Duplicate of aia-core-3zn (T-001), created by accident during sync

Scaffolded Vite vanilla JS project with Three.js. All acceptance criteria met: package.json has three in deps and vite in devDeps, index.html has canvas#three-canvas and div#app, vite.config.js sets port 5173, main.js imports THREE and logs REVISION, npm run build produces dist/ successfully.
Fixed main.js log format to use 'Three.js r' + THREE.REVISION per AC#5; build passes
Added CORSMiddleware to FastAPI app reading ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var, defaulting to http://localhost:5173. Tests in test/test_cors_middleware.py pass; full suite 726 tests passed.

Added ALLOWED_ORIGINS wildcard guard in main.py (raises ValueError if '*' present with allow_credentials=True). Fixed test assertions: allow_credentials header, None check for disallowed origin. Added multi-origin parsing test and wildcard guard test.
All 3 commits landed: frontend scaffold, CORS middleware+tests, cycle review docs. 728 tests pass.
Implemented frontend/src/api/client.js with all 10 required async functions. Build passes. Committed as 66fc71f.
Fixed 5 broken API client functions: fetchPlayerStats, fetchGameStats, fetchLeaderboard, updateHolecards, updateCommunityCards — correct routes, methods, and parameters. Build passes.

Created frontend/src/scenes/table.js with initScene(canvasElement): WebGLRenderer, PerspectiveCamera at (0,8,5), ambient + directional lighting, resize handler, RAF loop. Build passes. Commit 47344de.
Stored RAF handle in rafId, added dispose() that calls cancelAnimationFrame + removeEventListener. Build passes.
Implemented hash-based SPA router and nav bar; build passes, committed b4e812c
Added style.css import to main.js and nav a.active rule to style.css; build passes
Implemented tableGeometry.js with addPokerTable, computeSeatPositions, createSeatLabels, updateSeatLabelPositions, and loadSession. Build passes with 0 errors.
Added behind-camera guard (projected.z > 1) in updateSeatLabelPositions; hides label instead of rendering at mirrored position. Build passes.
Created frontend/src/views/playbackView.js with session list panel and loading flow. Build passes, committed as 995fbf2.
AC5 implemented (initScene, loadSession, updateSeatLabelPositions wired); XSS fixed in error catch and session row; player count uses s.player_count
Called onResize() before return in initScene; wrapped scene setup in requestAnimationFrame in playbackView.js. Build passes.
createCard factory implemented: BoxGeometry(0.7,1.0,0.02), canvas-rendered face (256x384px) with rank/suit, dark-blue back, flip() 0.3s Y-axis tween. Build passes 0 errors.
Session scrubber component created at frontend/src/components/sessionScrubber.js. Vite build passes. Committed as 84238e7.
Added updateLabel() call before return in createSessionScrubber to fire onChange with initial hand index on construction
Street scrubber component implemented in frontend/src/components/streetScrubber.js. Build passes. Committed eaaa2f0.
Fixed: spread assignment prevents caller mutation, fallback walk-back when active street becomes disabled, swapped initial updateUI/onStreetChange order
Implemented createChipStack and createChipStacks with lerp animation, P/L height scaling, negative red tint, and null neutral stacks. Build passes.
Imported createChipStacks, called after computeSeatPositions, updateChipStacks called in __onSessionLoaded. Build passes.
Implemented createCommunityCards with goToStreet/dispose. Flop animates 3 cards, Turn/River each add 1. Backwards scrubbing reverse-animates off table. Build passes.
inflightRemovals Set tracks in-flight removal meshes; dispose() drains and disposes them. No orphaned scene meshes.
animateCard returns cancel closure with cancelled flag; cancelHandles stored per slot; both addCard and removeCard cancel prior handle before starting new animation. No competing RAF loops.

Implemented createHoleCards with initHand, goToShowdown, goToPreFlop, dispose. All 5 ACs met: face-down pre-flop cards, flip-on-showdown, fold dimming + FOLD sprite, winner glow, null hole_cards left face-down. Build passes.
Fixed inline as part of aia-core-2pg review loop
Fixed inline as part of aia-core-2pg review loop
Fixed inline as part of aia-core-2pg review loop
Fixed inline as part of aia-core-2pg review loop
Fixed inline as part of aia-core-2pg review loop
Implemented createResultOverlay with all 5 ACs: centered overlay div, player table with hole cards/result/P/L, gold winner highlight, dismiss-only button, hidden by default. Build passes.
Implemented createStatsSidebar with cumulative P/L, sorted players (null-last), summary row, textContent-only DOM, dispose(); build passes.
Implemented renderDataView with sortable session table, expandable hand rows, loading/error states, and DOM-safe card formatting. Wired to #/data route in main.js. Build passes.
Stale check added after fetchHands in both success and catch paths of handleRowClick.

Player management UI implemented in frontend/src/components/playerManagement.js. Uses fetchLeaderboard() for player list with total hands count. New Player form with client-side validation, 409 duplicate error handling, and XSS-safe DOM API.
Added fetchPlayers() to client.js (GET /players). playerManagement now shows ALL registered players. AC4 DOM order fixed.
Session creation form implemented. Date picker, player multi-select, POST /games, inline 409 error, form reset. All 5 ACs satisfied.
Wired sessionScrubber onChange to updateChipStacks via computeCumulativePL. Added scrubber-container to HTML layout. Build passes, 1 file changed.
activeScrubber dispose + innerHTML clear moved before zero-hands guard. Both paths now unconditionally clean up.
onSuccess isolated in its own try/catch; PATCH wrapped as non-fatal; POST failure is the only path to outer catch.
Hand recording form implemented. Community card fields, per-player rows, card validation, duplicate detection, POST+PATCH with onSuccess. HIGH bug fixed in aia-core-4b1.
Made result/profit_loss fields read-only; they are not persisted by the backend
Wrapped playerName with encodeURIComponent in updateHolecards and fetchPlayerStats
Hand edit/correction form implemented in handEditForm.js. HIGH findings (rd8, xmq) fixed and verified by Scott. All ACs met.

Created frontend/README.md with prerequisites (Node.js ^20.19.0 or >=22.12.0, npm >=10), installation, dev server, build, environment variables (VITE_API_BASE_URL and ALLOWED_ORIGINS), FastAPI StaticFiles deployment snippet, and plain-language 3D scene explanation. 728 tests pass.
Added warning in frontend/README.md deployment section about @app.get('/') conflict with StaticFiles mount, including corrected main.py snippet showing route removal or relocation to /api/.
Installed preact, configured Vite esbuild JSX for Preact (jsxFactory/jsxFragment/jsxInject), created src/dealer/DealerApp.jsx, build passes
Implemented #/dealer route: added cleanup-aware router, Dealer nav link, Preact mount/unmount in main.js, fixed Vite 8 JSX config with @preact/preset-vite. Build passes.
Added uploadImage and getDetectionResults functions to frontend/src/api/client.js. Build passes.
Implemented GameCreateForm.jsx and wired into DealerApp.jsx. Build passes.
HandDashboard component created and wired into DealerApp step flow. Build passes.
Implemented PlayerGrid component and wired into DealerApp. Build passes.

Implemented dealer state reducer with useReducer. Created dealerState.js with reducer handling SET_GAME, SET_PLAYER_CARDS, SET_COMMUNITY_CARDS, RESET_HAND, SET_STEP. Refactored DealerApp.jsx to use useReducer. 9 unit tests pass, build passes.

T-009 complete: CameraCapture.jsx created with hidden file input, auto-trigger on mount, uploadImage+getDetectionResults flow, loading spinner, error+retry handling. DealerApp.jsx wired to show CameraCapture overlay on tile tap and transition to review step on detection result. Build passes.
Added visible initial state with Cancel button to CameraCapture overlay to prevent Android trap
Implemented DetectionReview.jsx and wired into DealerApp review step

All acceptance criteria already implemented in prior work (T-009). Verified: (1) Table tile triggers CameraCapture, (2) upload/detect flow is identical, (3) DetectionReview receives mode=community with 3-5 card expectations, (4) Table tile shows checkmark after SET_COMMUNITY_CARDS. Build passes.
Implemented CardPicker.jsx and updated DetectionReview.jsx with correction capability. Build passes.
Implemented Submit Hand button with payload assembly, duplicate-card validation, API submission, RESET_HAND dispatch, and error handling. All 15 frontend tests pass, build clean.
Implemented inline player creation in GameCreateForm.jsx: text input + Add button, POST /players on submit, auto-selects new player, 409 duplicate error shown inline. Build passes.
Mobile polish complete: Vite LAN host, 48px tap targets, global box-sizing reset, overflow-x prevention, touch optimizations. Build passes.

Implemented ResultEnum with won/folded/lost values. Updated PlayerHandEntry, PlayerResultEntry, HandResultUpdate to use ResultEnum | None. Updated stats routes and all 14 test files. 768 tests pass, pre-commit clean.
Implemented and tested: HandCreate fields optional, empty-body POST returns 201, backwards compatible, 775 tests pass
Fixed: filter None community cards in add_player_to_hand() before passing to validate_no_duplicate_cards(). 3 regression tests added.
Fixed: filter None community cards in edit_player_hole_cards() before passing to validate_no_duplicate_cards(). Covered by test_none_community_cards_bug.py.
Implemented and tested: PATCH /games/{game_id}/hands/{hand_number}/players/{player_name}/result endpoint. 16 new tests, 794 total passing, 0 regressions.

Added ResultEnum validation in validate_csv_rows() — invalid result strings (including legacy win/loss/fold) are now rejected with descriptive errors before database write. 15 new tests, 809 total passing.
Implemented and tested — equity.py ported from JS evaluator with exhaustive/Monte Carlo logic, 14 tests pass
Fixed: early return guard in calculate_equity() for 0 players (return []) and 1 player (return [1.0]). 4 new tests, 827 total passing.
Implemented equity endpoint with TDD: 9 new tests, 836 total passing. GET /games/{id}/hands/{num}/equity returns per-player equities. Frontend fetchEquity() added.
AC3 test added (empty→full sequence). 8/8 tests pass in test_empty_hand_creation_api.py, 837 total pass, pre-commit clean.

Implemented and tested: PlayerHandEntry card_1/card_2 now optional (Card | None = None), PlayerHandResponse card fields nullable, DB model + migration added, endpoint handles null cards in duplicate validation. 5 new tests + 1 updated test, 842 total passing.
Fixed: record_hand() now filters None cards in validation and uses conditional str() in persistence. 8 regression tests added, 850 total pass.
Fixed: edit_community_cards() now filters None hole cards before duplicate validation.
Fixed: edit_player_hole_cards() now filters None other-player cards before duplicate validation.
Fixed: HoleCardsUpdate.card_1/card_2 now Card | None = None; persistence uses conditional str().
Implemented and tested: currentHandId in state, per-player status field, SET_PLAYER_RESULT/SET_HAND_ID/FINISH_HAND actions. 20 tests pass (11 new).
GameSelector component implemented with TDD. 8 tests pass covering: sorted display, active/complete styling, onSelectGame/onNewGame callbacks, loading/error states.
Implemented pokerScene.js with createPokerScene(canvas, options) API. Refactored playbackView.js to use it. 7 unit tests passing, full suite green, build clean.

Implemented player tiles with status indicators: status text below name, color-coded backgrounds (white/playing, green/won, red/folded, orange/lost), 80px min-height tiles, Table tile retains checkmark. 6 new tests, 47 total passing.

Implemented per-player card collection flow: handleStartHand creates empty hand on backend, handleReviewConfirm PATCHes player cards via addPlayerToHand (new) or updateHolecards (retake), error toast on PATCH failure. 9 new tests, 56 total frontend tests passing, 0 regressions.

Implemented outcome buttons (Won/Folded/Lost). 12 new OutcomeButtons tests, 8 new DealerApp outcome flow tests, all 77 frontend tests pass. API client patchPlayerResult added. Direct outcome from PlayerGrid supported for fold-without-showing.
Implemented community card PATCH wiring: updateCommunityCards called in handleReviewConfirm before SET_COMMUNITY_CARDS dispatch, error toast on failure, 5 new tests all passing.
Implemented Finish Hand button, confirmation dialog, uncaptured player POSTing, and removed legacy handleSubmitHand. 10 new tests, 92 total passing.
Removed legacy handleSubmitHand batch path that created duplicate hands. Replaced Submit Hand button with Finish Hand in incremental flow.
Implemented DealerPreview.jsx with 9 tests, wired into DealerApp. All 101 frontend tests pass, pre-commit clean.
T-019 complete: equity badges in DealerPreview, re-fetch on community/player changes, error handling, 6 new tests (107 frontend total). Clean review.
Fixed: doFinishHand now tracks persisted players via Set state, filters them out on retry. 1 new test, 108 total, all pass.
Fixed: added None guards to 3 str(entry.card_N) sites in confirm_detection() + guarded correction loop. 3 regression tests, 853 total passing.

Implemented and tested. HandDashboard rewritten with fetchHands/createHand API integration, hand list with navigation. DealerApp updated to pass new props. All 120 frontend tests pass (12 HandDashboard + 34 DealerApp + 74 others).

Implemented and tested. Initial step changed to gameSelector, GameSelector wired with onNewGame→create and onSelectGame→dashboard, HandDashboard Back navigates to gameSelector. 5 new integration tests, 125 total tests passing.
Added integration test: clicking an existing game card in GameSelector transitions to HandDashboard. 126 frontend tests pass.

Implemented MobilePlaybackView.jsx with full-viewport canvas, bottom-drawer session picker, date-sorted game list, hand loading on selection. Route registered at #/playback-mobile. 9 tests passing, no regressions.
Implemented and tested — full dealer flow smoke test covers all 6 steps
